subject: docs(database): add shared database migration guide
body:
Documents the correct process for pushing migrations when multiple
projects share the same Supabase database. Covers the stub file
approach to avoid breaking other projects' migration tracking, and
warns against using `migration repair --status reverted` on
cross-project migrations.

Tags: docs, database, migrations, supabase
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: shared-db
Semver: patch
